TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Knights of Avalon Faction.

Translations.Comment: Direct translation. Noble knights of the legendary kingdom.
Miliz = militia. Citizen soldiers with swords.
Aspiranten = aspirants. Young warriors training to become knights.
Beritten = mounted. Jäger = hunters. Light cavalry.
Geschworene = sworn. Knights who have taken sacred oaths.
Skilled hunters serving as scouts and archers.
Trebuchet as technical term for the catapult. Alternative: Wurfmaschine.
Famous archers with longbows. Elite ranged troops.
Elite guards protecting the king. Best warriors of the realm.
Kept as fantasy creature name. Gryphon-horse hybrid.
Mythological winged horse. Kept as is.
Standard German for unicorn. Magical pure creature.
Jungfrau = maiden. Holy warrior blessed by the divine. Alternative: Heilige Jungfrau.
Paladin is universally recognized. Holy knight champion.
